phrases.intent_en: Ask where the medieval section is located

likely_response.local: Sala 3, al fondo del vestíbulo principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAH-lah AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL

responses.phonetic: SAH-lah AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Sala 3, al fondo del vestíbulo principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah pah-rah en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the main lobby, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the main lobby, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al fondo del vestíbulo principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the pre-Romanesque artifacts are displayed
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿en qué sala está el arte prerrománico?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, en keh SAH-lah es-TAH el AR-teh preh-roh-MAH-nee-ko?

likely_response.local: Sala de los Prerrománicos, segunda planta izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAH-lah DEH LOHS prehr-ROHMÁ-nee-kohs seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Second floor, room number four on the left.

responses.english: Second floor, room number four on the left.
responses.phonetic: SAH-lah DEH LOHS prehr-ROHMÁ-nee-kohs seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Sala de los Prerrománicos, segunda planta izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the former convent cloister is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está el claustro antiguo?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH el KLAWS-troh ahn-TEE-goh?

likely_response.local: En el patio central, acceso desde planta baja.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh thehnt-RAHL ahth-THEH-soh DEH-sdeh PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: In the central courtyard, access from ground floor.

responses.english: In the central courtyard, access from ground floor.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh thehnt-RAHL ahth-THEH-soh DEH-sdeh PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
responses.french: En el patio central, acceso desde planta baja.
